name: Nantong JiangTian Chemical Co., Ltd.
summary: Nantong JiangTian Chemical Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells chemical products in China and internationally. It primarily offers paraformaldehyde; formaldehyde; methyl chloride; ethylene glycol hemiacetal; 1,3,5-triacryloylhexahydro-1,3,5-triazine; and other chemical products. The company was founded in 1999 and is based in Nantong, China.
